perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video is a live-action vlog set in a warehouse store. A young woman wearing a black beret and a sheer top stands in an aisle filled with potted plants. (2) She points toward a Fiddle Leaf Fig plant and a price tag showing $899. (3) The camera moves closer to show the detail of the leaves and the woman's facial expressions as she speaks enthusiastically. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the care instructions on the label while her hand points to the text. (5) She gestures broadly with her hands and poses playfully to end the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, excited, and persuasive tone. (2) A male voice responds off-camera with a friendly and humorous tone, engaging in a dialogue with the woman. (3) Background sounds of a busy warehouse, including the low rumble of shopping carts and distant ambient chatter, are present. (4) Short cartoon-style sound effects (SFX) play when decorative text appears on the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top throughout. (2) Decorative Text: 'Only 899 NTD' and 'Exaggeratedly cheaper than IKEA' appear in large, colorful fonts to highlight the value proposition. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. (4) Decorative Text: 'Forest-style or crazy?' and 'Just kidding' appear to emphasize the humorous interaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Price/Value Comparison -> Product Care Details -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on-screen, 1 male voice off-camera, and at least 2 passers-by visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long dark hair wearing a black Kangol beret, a black sheer off-the-shoulder top over a grey tank, and distressed denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse retail environment with high industrial ceilings, large steel shelving units stacked with boxes, and a specialized plant display area.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and shopping recommendation vlog aimed at budget-conscious consumers interested in home decor. It synthesizes a visual demonstration of a product's quality with a spoken price comparison against a major competitor (IKEA) to persuade the audience of the item's value at Costco.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct comparison of prices between retailers and a verbal recommendation of the product's value.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Humorous banter with an off-screen partner and the use of 'Forest-style' (森系) subculture terminology.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-density text and quick cuts typical of short-form social media commerce content designed to drive foot traffic to retail stores.
